query:
-- Copiar closetConfig del item de closet desde v3 a v4
UPDATE quotation_items qi_v4
SET qi_v4.closetConfig = (
  SELECT qi_v3.closetConfig
  FROM quotation_items qi_v3
  WHERE qi_v3.quotationId = '4350001'  -- v3
  AND qi_v3.itemType = 'closet'
  AND qi_v3.itemNumber = qi_v4.itemNumber
)
WHERE qi_v4.quotationId = '4380001'  -- v4
AND qi_v4.itemType = 'closet'
AND qi_v4.closetConfig IS NULL;
